name: wireframes-toolkit
description: Research, create, and audit universal black-and-white Figma wireframes with Auto Layout and structured UX flows.

interface.longDescription: Research, build, and audit editable monochrome product wireframes with optional Mobbin evidence, Auto Layout, reusable macro-components and variants, correctly centered states, realistic behavior, responsive reflow, and false-positive-aware visual QA. A bundled setup skill safely audits required and optional companions.
defaultPrompt: Turn this product brief into a complete Figma wireframe flow.
Audit these Figma wireframes for UX and Auto Layout issues.
Extend this wireframe flow with missing states and edge cases.
